attractions.name: Nusa Penida
attractions.description: Island with stunning west coast exploration including Kelingking Beach, Angel's Billabong, and Broken Beach
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali - All Inclusive Guide - Prashita.pdf

attractions.name: Kelingking Beach
attractions.description: Iconic cliff viewpoint shaped like a T-Rex
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali - All Inclusive Guide - Prashita.pdf

attractions.name: Angel's Billabong
attractions.description: Natural infinity pool carved into rock formations with crystal-clear water during low tide
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali - All Inclusive Guide - Prashita.pdf

attractions.name: Broken Beach
attractions.description: Dramatic natural rock arch forming a circular cove with waves rolling through the opening
source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali - All Inclusive Guide - Prashita.pdf

attractions.name: Kelingking Beach Viewpoint
attractions.description: The famous T-rex cliff — one of Bali's most iconic views with cliffs plunging dramatically into bright turquoise water

attractions.name: Diamond Beach
attractions.description: Turquoise waters, white cliff walls, and dramatic rock formations shaped like diamonds

attractions.name: Atuh Beach
attractions.description: A calm, quieter beach with arch-shaped rock formations and soft sand

attractions.name: Tree House Molenteng
attractions.description: Instagram-famous viewpoint overlooking the entire bay

attractions.name: Kelingking Beach (Viewing Point Only)
attractions.description: Famous 'T-Rex cliff' formation with turquoise water crashing against towering limestone walls

attractions.name: Bubu Beach
attractions.description: Beach where you can actually swim with typically clear and inviting water

safety_tips.tip: Seas can occasionally be choppy — mild motion sickness tablets are recommended

transport_options.description: Crossing from mainland Bali to Nusa Penida island

source_files: Bali Indonesia/Bali - All Inclusive Guide - Prashita.pdf
